# Troubleshooting common issues and best practices {#sec-troubleshooting}

## Installation

<!-- TODO: adapt faq.qmd "Installation" section wholesale -->

## Creating data

<!-- TODO: adapt faq.qmd "Creating data" section -->

## Validating

<!-- TODO: adapt faq.qmd "Reading data" section, reframed -->

## Uploading / portal-specific

<!-- TODO: new content — file size limits, unsupported CRS/class combos, stuck-in-review, who to contact -->

## Performance

<!-- TODO: adapt faq.qmd "Performance" section -->

## Best practices

<!-- TODO: adapt faq.qmd "Citation, licensing and contribution" -->
